class.name: MultiNodeAudio
class.brief_description: Software-mixed spatial audio for all instances through a single audio channel.
class.description: MultiNodeAudio decodes a source AudioStreamWAV to raw PCM, then software-mixes all playing instances into a single AudioStreamGenerator output with per-instance distance attenuation and stereo panning. No voice limit — thousands of simultaneous sources through one audio channel. Requires AudioStreamWAV format (16-bit or 8-bit, import with Compress Mode set to Disabled).

members.member: The audio stream to play. Must be an AudioStreamWAV (16-bit or 8-bit PCM). Other formats are not supported by the software mixer. Import your audio as WAV with Compress Mode set to Disabled.
Base volume for all instances in decibels. 0 dB = full volume. Negative values reduce volume. Combined with per-instance volume and distance attenuation.
Maximum distance in meters at which an instance can be heard. Instances beyond this distance are skipped entirely during the mix loop, saving CPU.
Distance in meters at which the sound is at full volume. Closer than this distance, volume does not increase further. Attenuation follows inverse distance from this point outward.
The audio bus that the mixed output is routed to. Change to send all instance audio through a specific bus for effects processing.
When enabled, instances loop back to the start when playback reaches the end. A short crossfade is applied at the loop boundary to prevent clicks.
Automatically start playing all instances when the scene loads and instances are created.

Post-mix output amplification in decibels. Applied after all instance voices are mixed together. Use to boost the overall output level when many quiet sources are mixed. Output is soft-clipped to prevent hard clipping.

Skip the entire audio mix loop when no playing instances are within max_distance of the listener. Saves significant CPU when the player is far from all sound sources. Disable if you need silent instances to keep advancing their playback position.

method.name: play_instance
method.description: Start playing audio for a single instance from the beginning. Does nothing if the instance is already playing.

method.name: stop_instance
method.description: Stop audio playback for a single instance.

method.name: play_all
method.description: Start playing all active instances from the beginning.

method.name: set_instance_playing
method.description: Set the playing state for a single instance. Equivalent to calling play_instance or stop_instance.

method.name: get_instance_playing
method.description: Check whether a specific instance is currently playing.

method.name: set_instance_volume
method.description: Set the volume offset for a single instance in decibels. Stacks with the node's base volume_db and distance attenuation.

method.name: get_instance_volume
method.description: Get the per-instance volume offset in decibels.

method.name: set_instance_pitch
method.description: Set the pitch scale for a single instance. 1.0 = normal speed, 2.0 = double speed (one octave up), 0.5 = half speed (one octave down).

method.name: get_instance_pitch
method.description: Get the pitch scale for a specific instance.
